seo.title: About Us - Rawafid Al Omran
seo.description: Learn about Rawafid Al Omran's story and our mission to deliver exceptional construction and engineering solutions.

hero.title: About Us
hero.description: Rawafid Al Omran - Your trusted partner in construction and engineering since 1998

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Since 1998
story.paragraph1: Rawafid Al Omran began with a simple vision: to deliver construction solutions that combine quality, innovation, and commitment. Over more than 25 years, the company has grown to become one of the leading contracting companies in the region.
story.paragraph2: We started with small projects in Riyadh, and today we own a massive project portfolio including residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects throughout Saudi Arabia and the Gulf countries.
story.paragraph3: We take pride in our team of over 200 specialists in engineering and construction, who share our passion for excellence and innovation.

statistics.title: Numbers That Speak
statistics.subtitle: Our Achievements
statistics.description: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver exceptional construction and engineering solutions that meet our clients' needs and contribute to developing community infrastructure.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the first choice in the construction and engineering industry, focusing on sustainability and innovation.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What Sets Us Apart
values.description: Our core values guide everything we do

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We are committed to the highest quality standards in every project.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: We place the safety of our team and clients at the top of our priorities.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We always strive for excellence in every project we undertake.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We work transparently and adhere to the highest standards of professional ethics.

seo.title: Privacy Policy - Rawafid Al Omran
seo.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data

sections.informationWeCollectDesc: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
sections.howWeUseDesc: We use the information we collect to:
sections.informationSharingDesc: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy. We may share information with:
sections.contactUsDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

items.contactInfo: Contact information (name, email address, phone number)
items.otherInfo: Any other information you choose to provide
items.provideServices: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
items.respondInquiries: Respond to your inquiries and fulfill your requests
items.sendNotices: Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
items.communicateProducts: Communicate with you about products, services, and events
items.monitorTrends: Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
items.preventFraud: Detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent or illegal activities
items.serviceProviders: Service providers who assist in our operations
items.legalAuthorities: Legal authorities when required by law
items.objectProcessing: Object to processing of your data

seo.title: Terms of Service - Rawafid Al Omran
seo.description: Read our terms and conditions governing your use of our services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms and conditions governing your use of our services

sections.acceptanceDesc: By accessing and using our website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
sections.descriptionServicesDesc: We provide digital solutions including but not limited to:
sections.userResponsibilitiesDesc: As a user of our services, you agree to:
sections.intellectualPropertyDesc: All content, designs, logos, and materials provided through our services are the intellectual property of our company or our clients. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without explicit permission.
sections.paymentTermsDesc: Payment terms for our services are as follows:
sections.limitationLiabilityDesc: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use our services.
sections.confidentialityDesc: We respect the confidentiality of your business information and project details. All information shared during project discussions is kept confidential and protected under our non-disclosure agreements.
sections.terminationDesc: Either party may terminate services with written notice. Upon termination, any outstanding payments become immediately due, and we will deliver all completed work.
sections.changesTermsDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
sections.contactInformationDesc: For questions regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us:

responsibilities.security: Maintain the security of your account credentials
responsibilities.illegal: Not use our services for any illegal purposes
responsibilities.laws: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
responsibilities.interfere: Not interfere with the proper functioning of our services

payment.deposit: A deposit of 30-50% is required before project commencement
payment.finalPayment: Final payment is due upon project completion
payment.ongoing: Payment terms for ongoing contracts are specified in individual agreements
payment.lateFees: Late payments may incur additional fees

seo.title: Cookie Policy - Rawafid Al Omran
seo.description: Learn about how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies

sections.whatAreCookiesDesc: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
sections.thirdPartyCookiesDesc: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We use:
sections.managingPreferencesDesc: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can:
sections.browserSettingsDesc: Most browsers allow you to manage cookie settings. Here's how to access them:
sections.impactDisablingDesc: If you choose to disable cookies, please note that some features of our website may not work properly. You may experience reduced functionality and may need to re-enter information more frequently.
sections.updatesPolicyDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
sections.contactUsDesc: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:

types.essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility.
types.performanceDesc: These cookies collect information about how visitors use our website, such as which pages are most frequently visited. This data helps us improve our website's performance.
types.functionalityDesc: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as language preferences) and provide enhanced, personalized features.
types.targetingDesc: These cookies are used to deliver relevant advertisements to you. They track your browsing habits and help us measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns.

thirdParty.analytics: Google Analytics - To understand how visitors use our site
thirdParty.maps: Google Maps - To display location information
thirdParty.social: Social Media Plugins - To allow sharing content on social platforms

duration.session: Session Cookies - Deleted when you close your browser
duration.persistent: Persistent Cookies - Remain on your device for a set period or until manually deleted

managing.delete: Delete all cookies from your browser
managing.block: Block cookies from being set on your browser
managing.allowCurrent: Allow cookies from only the website you are currently visiting
managing.blockThird: Block third-party cookies from being set
managing.clearOnClose: Clear all cookies when you close your browser

browsers.chrome: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies
